title: SACRAMENTO, CA – Today, Assemblymember Damon Connolly (D-San Rafael) presented AB 1 to the Assembly Insurance Committee, where the bill passed with unanimous and bipartisan support

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The current state of the insurance market is leaving thousands of families without coverage.",
    "AB 1 will help consumers save money on their insurance bills while mitigating wildfire risk.",
    "In areas where wildfire risks are high, insurance is increasingly unaffordable and absent.",
    "The Safer from Wildfires program is the only avenue open to consumers to receive direct discounts for hardening their homes and neighborhoods.",
    "As new and safer building materials come to market and wildfire prevention methods evolve, it is important to periodically revisit the regulations to ensure adequate relief is offered to community members."
  ]
}
```
